As an undergraduate student majoring

in Management Information Systems

(MIS),With a solid foundation in MIS

principles and a keen interest in

technology and business integration, I

am eager to contribute to dynamic

projects within a forward-thinking

organization.

I have honed my ability to manage

group dynamics, facilitate discussions,

and ensure the successful completion

of collaborative initiatives. My role has

allowed me to develop strong

organizational and problem-solving

skills, which I am excited to bring to an

internship position.
